name: Anya Mercer
headline: Applied ML researcher building production-facing decision systems
summary: Anya combines quantitative research, machine learning, and systems thinking. Her strongest work sits at the boundary between rigorous modeling and shipping usable tools.
differentiators: Turns research ideas into decision-ready tooling
Comfortable with ambiguous technical problem framing
Strong at extracting measurable signals from messy systems

projects.name: Cross-Chain Network Optimizer
projects.summary: Designed graph-theoretic models to optimize communication paths across distributed ledger networks.
projects.outcome: Identified bridge allocation patterns that reduced expected latency under constrained resources.

projects.name: APAL-FinBERT
projects.summary: Built a parameter-efficient adaptation layer for multi-task financial NLP on top of a frozen FinBERT backbone.
projects.outcome: Improved multi-task performance while updating only a small fraction of model parameters.

projects.name: AI Companion Concept
projects.summary: Coordinated an early AI product concept blending user research, machine learning ideas, and cross-disciplinary delivery.
projects.outcome: Turned exploratory ideas into a scoped product concept with clear technical and design constraints.

name: Omar Vale
headline: ML platform engineer focused on deployment velocity and observability
summary: Omar works best on roles where machine learning meets infrastructure. He has a bias for production quality, tooling, and measurable platform improvements.
differentiators: Builds platform primitives that help teams ship models faster
Strong on production reliability and developer experience
Comfortable turning rough ML workflows into repeatable systems

projects.name: Model Release Rail
projects.summary: Created an internal path from experiment to deployment with tests, approvals, and rollback hooks.
projects.outcome: Reduced deployment lead time from days to hours for multiple ML teams.

projects.name: Real-time Drift Watch
projects.summary: Implemented production monitoring for model drift, data quality, and alerting.
projects.outcome: Improved issue detection speed and cut manual monitoring effort.

projects.name: Feature Layer Toolkit
projects.summary: Built a lightweight feature serving layer to make online inference more consistent.
projects.outcome: Improved reuse across fraud, ranking, and recommendation workflows.
